/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS  -fPIC -std=gnu++17 -Werror -Wno-covered-switch-default -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -shared -Wl,-soname,libTritonPluginsTestLib.so -o libTritonPluginsTestLib.so CMakeFiles/TritonPluginsTestLib.dir/TritonPlugin.cpp.o  -lstdc++fs /usr/local/lib/libMLIRPass.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRAnalysis.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRDataLayoutInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferStridedMetadataInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferTypeOpInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRLoopLikeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRControlFlowInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRFunctionInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRCallInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRPresburger.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSideEffectInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRViewLikeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRIR.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libzstd.so /usr/local/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a
